description: A heavy synchronous task on an interaction handler blocks the main thread, spiking INP and freezing the UI.
body: Failure mode: an event handler runs an expensive synchronous computation or large render, monopolizing the main thread so the browser cannot paint the interaction response. Detection signals: a long task (>50ms) in the trace aligned with the interaction; high measured INP; visible freeze after click/type. Do not run heavy work synchronously on the interaction path. Safer fallback: chunk the work, yield to the scheduler, move computation off the hot path or to a worker, and confirm shorter tasks and lower INP in a trace.
